KeyspaceName.markdownDescription:
Name for Cassandra keyspace

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9_]{1,47}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Tags.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

ClientSideTimestampsEnabled.description: Indicates whether client-side timestamps are enabled (true) or disabled (false) for all tables in the keyspace. To add a Region to a single-Region keyspace with at least one table, the value must be set to true. After you enabled client-side timestamps for a table, you can’t disable it again.
ClientSideTimestampsEnabled.markdownDescription:
Indicates whether client-side timestamps are enabled (true) or disabled (false) for all tables in the keyspace. To add a Region to a single-Region keyspace with at least one table, the value must be set to true. After you enabled client-side timestamps for a table, you can’t disable it again.

---

Required: No  
Type: Boolean  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ReplicationStrategy.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: SINGLE_REGION | MULTI_REGION  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-z]{2,}-[a-z]+-[0-9]+$
